sentences.arabic: يَقْرَأُ النَّاسُ الْأَخْبَارَ الْيَوْمِيَّةَ عَبْرَ التَّطْبِيقَاتِ الْإِخْبَارِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi čitaju dnevne vijesti putem aplikacija za vijesti.
sentences.translationEn: People read the daily news through news applications.

sentences.arabic: بَعْضُ هَذِهِ الْأَخْبَارِ قَدْ تَكُونُ غَيْرَ صَحِيحَةٍ أَوْ قَدِيمَةً.
sentences.translation: Neke od ovih vijesti mogu biti netačne ili zastarjele.
sentences.translationEn: Some of these news items might be incorrect or old.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، يَبْحَثُ الْقَارِئُ الذَّكِيُّ عَنِ الْمَصَادِرِ الْمَوْثُوقَةِ فَقَطْ.
sentences.translation: Zbog toga pametan čitalac traži samo pouzdane izvore.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, the smart reader looks for reliable sources only.
